138 C2A C2A_HEARAID_USED (C2A) Hearing Aid Present and Used CHAR 1 Communications/hearing patterns: communication devices/techniques - hearing aid present/used during last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
139 C2B C2B_HRAID_NOT_USE (C2B) Hearing Aid Present and Not Used Regularly CHAR 1 Communications/hearing patterns: communication devices/techniques - hearing aid present/not used regularly. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 =
